form.formComment: Comes here off a 46-day let-up for a new yard. Last start won by a nose at Kyneton Cg&E Bm56 February 27 over 1218m on a soft track defeating Camp Cable with 61kg at $16. The start before that raced on the pace before fading 8th of 13 at Echuca Bm56 on December 31 over 1200m, 3 len behind Zenacity with 61kg at $31. Trialled well since coming north and looks set to make an immediate impact.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Brushed with Red Sphere, shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 6th of 10 at Gold Coast Poly Bm55 on March 28 over 1050m, 4 len behind Call To Courage with 60kg at $10. Previously second-up 8th of 11 at Grafton Bm66 on July 17 over 1000m, 6 len behind Port Erin carrying 60kg at $31. SCRATCHED.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation fifth of 10 at this track Cl3 Bm66 January 9 over 1015m, 2.25 len behind Immortality carrying 57.5kg at $9.50. Previous preparation first-up won by 2.25 len this track Ctry Bm58 November 3 over 1000m defeating Kirra's Sister carrying 57kg at $3.40. Another big run while fresh is on the cards.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 3rd of 9 at Port Macquarie Ctry Bm58 on March 16 over 1006m, 1.4 len behind Yes Yes Boss carrying 61kg at $9. Previously second-up ran last of 11 at Taree Cl3 on July 22 over 1262m, on a slow track; 14 len behind Bodhi Boy with 59kg at $12. Further improvement in store and from a good gate poses a genuine threat.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign won by 1.5 len this track Ctry Bm58 December 9 over 1000m defeating Zaindara carrying 58kg at $2.60. First up last campaign second in a small field at Murwillumbah Ctry Mdn-Sw October 14 over 1010m, 1.0 len behind Alleze with 56.5kg at $2.60. Rarely far away and should give a good account while fresh.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming did the work up front then tired 7th of 10 at Grafton Bm74 on March 5 over 1190m, 3.5 len behind Poseidon's Son with 52kg at $151. Last start won by 1.1 len at this track Bm66 March 23 over 1000m on a heavy track defeating Amaya's Secret with 53kg at $26. Heading the right way and is a major player again.
